tools.name: analyze_copilot_value
tools.description: Analyze Copilot usage, seats, and spend data from text or document extracts.

source_text.description: Extracted text or spreadsheet contents containing usage, seats, and spend data.

company_name.description: Optional company name to label the analysis.

source_type.description: The source format of the input data.

tools.name: predict_copilot_value
tools.description: Run the trained ROI, waste, and expansion models on a company or department's Copilot numbers. Returns exact, reproducible ROI %, wasted-license cost, an expansion-recommendation probability, and a first-principles finance breakdown. Use this to confirm precise, CFO-facing figures.

company_name.description: Optional company or department label shown on the ROI card.

licensed_users.description: Number of users assigned a Copilot license.

active_users.description: Number of users actively using Copilot.

adoption_rate.description: Active users divided by licensed users (0-1). Derived from licensed/active users when omitted.

app_mix_score.description: Breadth-of-usage score across Word, Outlook, Teams, and Excel actions.

avg_hours_saved_per_user_month.description: Average hours saved per active user per month.

loaded_hourly_cost_usd.description: Blended loaded hourly labor cost (salary plus overhead).

license_cost_month_usd.description: Total monthly Copilot license spend in USD.

company_size.description: Total employee headcount of the company.

enablement_cost_month_usd.description: Optional monthly enablement/training cost in USD. Defaults to 0.

roi_percent_month.description: Optional actual monthly ROI %. When omitted, the ROI model's prediction is chained into the expansion model.

tools.name: render_value_card
tools.description: Render a standardized Copilot ROI Adaptive Card from either tool outputs or prompt-based reasoning outputs.

roi_percent_numeric.description: Numeric ROI used to auto-classify health when health is omitted.

model_roi_percent.description: Model ROI text shown in caption.

roi_caption.description: Short label for the ROI basis.

health.description: Health label (for example: Strong, Moderate, At Risk).

health_color.description: Adaptive Card color token (Good, Warning, Attention, Default).

expansion_color.description: Adaptive Card color token for expansion line.

tools.name: benchmark_department_value
tools.description: Benchmark departments by ROI drivers, rank low performers, and return targeted Copilot recommendations with a comparison chart URL.

company_name.description: Optional company label for the benchmark output.

departments_json.description: JSON stringified array of department rows. Each row should include: name, licensed_users, active_users, roi_percent_month, avg_hours_saved_per_user_month, and optional adoption_rate, waste_cost_month_usd.

low_performer_count.description: How many low-performing departments to highlight. Defaults to 3.
